Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Pltf, Request To Deem Admissions As True, Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-01-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michelle R. Barrett for defendant and moving party: Whitney Young Child Development centers, Inc.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE STATED. HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted WITH MODIFICATIONS: Defendant's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories, request for production of documents, and for an order to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. The matters set forth in defendant's request for admissions set #1 are ordered admitted. Plaintiff is ordered to provide complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $821.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order.
MODIFICATION: SANCTIONS PAYABLE WITHIN 60 DAYS. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2005 Continued To Jan-23-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-25-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Attorney Frank P. Sarro, Motion to withdraw as counsel for Plaintiff Charlene D. McCully.
RULING: Attorney Frank P. Sarro, 415-296-3883, Law Office of Frank P. Sarry moving to withdraw as counsel; Plaintiff Charlene D. McCully; Michelle R. Barrett, 415-433-1940 of Child Development Center.
RULING: In camera hearing held as attorney/client privilege might be disclosed. The Court Grants the motion to be relieved as counsel. The transcript of this proceeding is under seal and not to be released except on order of court. (302/REQ). Order signed in open court. Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Reporter: Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
